title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Cafe Coffee Day Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Cafe Coffee Day Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Cafe Coffee Day Digital Technologies in Indore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Cafe Coffee Day Digital Technologies:
Cafe Coffee Day Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cafe Coffee Day Digital Technologies!
